provenance: WorldBible section 9: eerie red light; lights the U'mar shrine; different from lightstone. Thermal/value numbers invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing.
notes: Passive emitter (PLAN-v0: 'Glowstone: passive red light') - always on, never charged, never shatters; the deliberate contrast to lightstone. Opaque body that glows (opacity 31 + emissive), like coal that burns red.
